candidate_genes: High-LD region includes LRR genes Glyma11g29010 and Glyma11g29287
evidence_status: GWAS significant SNP
source_reference: Chang and Hartman 2017, Frontiers in Plant Science 8:670, DOI 10.3389/fpls.2017.00670
notes: Four SNPs significant; ss715609849 used as fixed covariate; LD around 27-30 Mb on chr11 in Wm82.a1 reported.
